evidence_ranges.purpose: header scan for English-related labels across all sheet columns
2026 monthly payment amounts for all English-label candidate columns
formula evidence that BZ is the primary English group total over CA:EM in sampled daily rows

evidence_ranges.range: SupermetricsQueries!A1:BA120 and top ranges of sampled related tabs

classification_method.primary_group_total: Include column BZ where row 7 is total and row 8 is 영어; sampled daily formula BZ127 is =sum(CA127:EM127).
classification_method.outside_group_rule: Add columns outside CA:EM only when the visible header explicitly contains 영어 or English, excluding other total columns to avoid double counting.
classification_method.code_prefix_warning: Do not sum all EN* columns blindly; headers include non-English courses such as EN190=근대철학.

top_nonzero_contributors.label: 미국 가서 바로 쓰는 영어 패키지

notes: ROAS, 광고비, ad spend, spend, and cost were not found in inspected workbook evidence.
Observed 광고 text was coupon/product text, not advertising cost evidence.
SupermetricsQueries inspected range exposed instruction/header rows but no query rows with metrics or ad-spend fields.
